title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Omkar Realtors

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Omkar Realtors
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Omkar Realtors. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Omkar Realtors:
Omkar Realtors is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omkar Realtors!
